Title: Stylish Woman Portrait in Yellow Sweater - Pop Art Illustration
Description:
Bring a pop of color and contemporary flair to any space with this vibrant illustration of a stylish woman. This artwork features a striking portrait of a woman with short, white bob hair, wearing a vivid yellow knitted sweater and a contrasting black turtleneck.

The bold, stylized pop art aesthetic combined with the bright colors—yellow, teal, and black—makes this piece an instant focal point. It captures a sense of modern, confident style and artistic energy.

  • Vibrant Aesthetic: Perfect for those who love pop culture, graphic art, or modern illustrative styles.
  • Color Pop: The rich yellow sweater and teal background create a lively, eye-catching contrast.
  • Versatile Decor: Ideal for gallery walls, living rooms, dormitories, or any space needing a cheerful, artistic touch.

This print makes a fantastic gift for art lovers, fashion enthusiasts, or anyone looking to add a joyful, contemporary piece of wall decor to their home.
